working_on: Issue close-out campaign C5: apply_migration empirical postcondition verification (Issue #23). New Layer 2.5 inline assertion mechanism + new exit code 8 + retroactive annotation of all 15 Phase 5 seed migrations + ops/ADR amendments + first-exercise readiness note.
outcome_summary: Issue close-out campaign C5 (Issue #23) closed cleanly. apply_migration.py gains Layer 2.5 empirical postcondition verification: parser + verifier + main() wiring + new exit code 8 (body+record OK but assertions failed; schema_migrations recorded regardless because body has committed; distinct from exit 7 recording fault). All 15 Phase 5 seed migrations annotated (0060_seed_crossbridges_part1.sql first as the highest silent-skip risk; other 14 via one-shot script copying prose-declared integers). 47 pytests green (was 22; +24 new + 1 NEXT_SECTION_HEADER_RE terminator test added during 0060 first-annotation when the parser hit PostgreSQL `::` casts in subsequent prose). ADR 0055 + ADR 0039 amended in-place; migration-discipline.md gains Layer 2.5 section + Layer 3 cold-review prompt step 3; expression-contract-instantiation.md updated; CLAUDE.md routine-mode-machinery bullet rewritten; new first-exercise readiness note per ADR 0053 (T1-A pending next routine fire post-S-0094). Decision drawer at paideia/decisions (drawer_paideia_decisions_a69e31a0b95aa43593fb1810). Validator at shutdown: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns hold at baseline (health_check_overdue per the campaign-accepted deferral; missing_rigor_score Phase-5 carryover; issue_collision for in-scope #23 plus adjacent #33/#34). Health-check audit deferral continues per the campaign plan; S-0095 boot will be slots_since=18, overdue by 8.
declared_scope: Close Issue #23 by adding a Layer 2.5 empirical postcondition verification step to engine/tools/apply_migration.py — inline `-- Postcondition-Assertions:` parser + `verify_postconditions()` runner + new exit code 8 + WARNING-on-missing-block. Annotate all 15 Phase 5 seed migrations under product/seed-graph/migrations/ (with 0060_seed_crossbridges_part1.sql first). Amend ADR 0055 (exit code 8) and ADR 0039 (Layer 2.5 as structural new layer). Refine engine/operations/migration-discipline.md (Layer 2.5 section + Layer 3 cold-review prompt) and engine/operations/expression-contract-instantiation.md. Author engine/build_readiness/apply_migration_postcondition_first_exercise.md per ADR 0053. Update CLAUDE.md routine-mode machinery list bullet.
